155.reason: [The file writing is inside the loop, causing it to overwrite the output for each line. This means only the last line's tokens are written to the file, resulting in missing tokens from previous lines, including the final RBRACE from the last line.]

62.reason: IndexOutOfBounds if i reaches line.length() after increment

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  IndexOutOfBounds if i reaches line.length() after increment
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The original code lacks a bounds check (i < line.length()) in the while loop condition. If the line ends with whitespace characters, i will increment beyond the string length, causing a StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when line.charAt(i) is accessed. This crash prevents the last token(s) from being processed and written if they appear on a line that triggers this or if the crash happens on the final line processing.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  IndexOutOfBounds if i == line.length() after whitespace loop
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Added safety check after skipping whitespace to ensure we don't access charAt with an out-of-bounds index if the line consisted entirely of whitespace or ended with whitespace.
